entries.description: Read the constitution preload + spec + both design docs; confirmed provider keys; registered via start_session (claude / anthropic / claude-fable-5, totalSessions=4).

Routed architecture decision (tier 3, opus) on the fail-loud duplicate-name check: repo-family identity from the existing worktree enumeration (zero new git calls) + root-relative path in the identity key; one deterministic winner row flagged with optional duplicateNameError; readAllSessionSetsWithDiagnostics envelope + one deduped re-arming console.error; no throwing, no notifications from the data layer. Saved raw: s1-collision-check-architecture.json.

Routed analysis (tier 2, gemini-pro) for the Step-3.5 AI assignment: S2 seat recommendation Opus-class/high with three supervision points; S1 delegation split confirmed sound. Saved raw: s1-next-orchestrator-analysis.json; ai-assignment.md authored.

Built readModulesManifest(root) in fileSystem.ts: real YAML parse of docs/modules.yaml (routerConfig.ts house style for standalone .yaml), tolerant-entry rules (missing slug dropped, duplicate keeps first, title defaults to slug, list fields filtered), null on absent/malformed = single implicit module. ModuleManifestEntry type added.

Threaded module/moduleTitle onto SessionSet and module onto SessionSetConfig: parseSessionSetConfig parses the raw module: key; readSessionSets validates it against the manifest slugs (manifest-known slug attributes; unknown/absent/no-manifest read as the implicit module with the raw value kept on config.module). All SessionSet/SessionSetConfig test fixtures updated.

Implemented the fail-loud check per the routed ruling: discoverRootsWithFamilies tags each root with a repo familyId (main worktree realpath); readAllSessionSetsWithDiagnostics groups merge candidates by name, detects >1 distinct (familyId, relPath) identity as a true collision, flags the precedence winner with duplicateNameError, returns a collisions[] envelope, and emits one deduped re-arming console.error. readAllSessionSets() keeps its signature; the legitimate main+worktree merge is unchanged.

Added src/test/suite/modulesManifest.test.ts (16 tests: manifest matrix, attribution matrix, config key, collision matrix incl. a real git-worktree same-family fixture and the dedup/re-arm cases). Full unit suite 1289 passing; tsc clean; compile clean; eslint adds zero new problems (7 pre-existing errors in untouched files remain the baseline).

Layer 1 pytest: 2905 passed/6 skipped/1 failed; the failure (drift-guard real-repo scan) was pre-existing at HEAD: the Set-088 remediation doc quoted a banned stale-tier-framing bigram at verification-loop-remediation-2026-07.md:94. Fixed in-flight by rewording the quote (prefer-removal; the allow-marker route is allowlist-gated); drift-guard file 25/25 green after the edit. Playwright Layer 3: all 19 specs fail locally with one identical launchVSCode firstWindow timeout BEFORE any assertion; reproduced identically at clean HEAD with session changes stashed - environmental (agent shell cannot open the Electron window), CI matrix is the effective Layer 3 gate. Unit suite 1289 green; tsc/compile clean.

R1 (gpt-5-4, ISSUES_FOUND, 1 bundled unknown-severity finding, 3 parts): (a) not-closed/no-disposition - workflow-order misread, verification runs pre-close by design; documented in the conventions block, not a defect. (b) require non-empty codeRoots/planPath - dismissed with citation: recommendation 2.4 sanctions codeRoots: [] for integration modules and Phase 1 is display-only (enforcement deferred to set 088). (c) wrong-shape manifest indistinguishable from no-manifest - FIXED: readModulesManifest now console.warns on present-but-wrong-shape (not a mapping / no modules: list) before degrading; new test asserts warn fires and absent stays silent. Unit suite 1290 green; ledger recorded in s1-conventions.md.

R2 (gpt-5-4, ISSUES_FOUND, 1 bundled unknown-severity finding, 2 parts): (a) per-set unknown-slug warning misreported the no-valid-manifest condition - FIXED: warning now gated on modulesManifest !== null; absent silent, malformed warns once at manifest level; new 3-condition test. (b) test-count evidence inconsistent (1289 vs 1290) - FIXED: counts were chronological (each round added tests); conventions Suite baseline now carries the single final total 1291/18 and all echoes updated (L-065-1). LOOP STOP at the 2-round automatic cap per the constitution: no Critical/Major was rated in either round (all findings unrated nits, edge-case-exhaustion pattern); all actionable parts fixed in flight, dismissals cited in the s1-conventions.md ledger. Verdict recorded as ISSUES_FOUND_RESOLVED_IN_FLIGHT (allowlisted extension token). Suite 1291 green, tsc/compile clean.

R3 (close-backstop round, gpt-5-4): Major - suite-green claim not substantiated for Layer 3: FIXED with exact-revision evidence, CI run 29110488046 on the code commit dd5c923 fully green incl. Playwright Layer 3 on windows/macos/ubuntu (also proves the local launch failure was environmental, and turns CI green after two red runs from the pre-existing drift-guard failure this session fixed). Minor - activity-log totalSessions 0: FIXED to 4 via the SessionLog writer. Minor - files_changed incomplete: FIXED, now exhaustive (31 paths) over the pre-session..HEAD diff plus round-3 artifacts. Conventions ledger updated; disposition summary rescoped per-layer evidence.

R4 (gpt-5-4): (a) regenerate-round-3-artifacts finding DISMISSED as contrary to the constitution (saved verification artifacts are immutable; resolution lives in the ledger + later rounds; the verificationVerdict: null observation repeats the R1 workflow-order dismissal). (b) present-but-unreadable modules.yaml silently null - FIXED: read-failure branch warns with path+error; new EISDIR-based test; unit suite 1292/19 final. Escalation: rounds 1-4 produced zero structured Critical/Major (all envelope severities unknown) and each round surfaced fresh unrated nits after fixes - edge-case exhaustion per the bounded-round rule. Round 5 is a THIRD-PROVIDER opinion (openai excluded alongside anthropic via the verify_session route_fn seam, Set 086 precedent) rather than another same-verifier round.

Third-provider round-5 attempts (google): gemini-3-1-pro 429 across two runs (3 API attempts each) + 120s backoff; registry note: it carries is_enabled_as_verifier: false yet was selected for session-verification - flagged as a possible router selection gap for operator review (out of Phase-1 scope, no ai_router changes). Temporary uncommitted is_enabled toggle to steer selection to gemini-pro (2.5, verifier-enabled; Set 086 fallback precedent) - also 429: the google provider is quota-dead right now. Nothing was written by any failed attempt (artifact-less). Per the Step-6 escalation ladder, round 5 falls back to the remaining cross-provider verifier (gpt-5-4) with the full cross-round adjudication ledger in the conventions block; if it still blocks on fresh unrated nits, the loop SUSPENDS to the operator.

R5 (gpt-5-4 ladder-fallback): (a) stale FINAL-count/round-history echoes - FIXED: s1-conventions.md rewritten with one authoritative baseline (1293 unit tests / 20 Set-087 tests) and the disposition summary carries the same finals + full round history. (b) files_changed missing round-4 artifacts - FIXED: regenerated exhaustively (35 paths) + explicit policy for the running round's own artifacts. (c) dangling symlink at docs/modules.yaml bypassed the unreadable-manifest warning via the existsSync precheck - FIXED: attempt-read-first; ENOENT silent only when lstat confirms no directory entry; symlink test with environment skip guard. Suite 1293 green, tsc/compile clean.

CI fully green for every code commit in the session: dd5c923 (run 29110488046), fe74dbf/R4 fix (run 29111369426), 1fb5286/R5 fix - the final code commit (run 29111967215) - all jobs green incl. Playwright Layer 3 on windows/macos/ubuntu. Conventions CI-evidence section updated with per-commit citations.
